arts.ttl: Harry Kane dropped by Lee Carsley amid fallout from England captain's blast at team-mates
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane - who slammed team-mates on Wednesday - has been left on the bench by England interim boss Lee Carsley for the UEFA Nations League match against Greece

arts.ttl: England's Kane benched for Greece clash; Watkins in
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane has been left on the bench for Thursday's UEFA Nations League clash against Greece, with Ollie Watkins taking his place in the starting lineup.

arts.ttl: Greece v England: Nations League – live
arts.sum: Nations League updates, 7.45pm GMT kick-off in Athens Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And email Scott England, as a harrumphing Harry Kane has noted, are already without Bukayo Saka, Declan Rice, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Cole Palmer, Phil Foden, Jack Grealish, Levi Colwill, Jarrad Branthwaite and Aaron Ramsdale. They’re also without Kane in their starting XI. He’s on the bench – injury is reportedly not a factor - with Kyle Walker taking over captain’s duties. Curtis Jones starts for the first time. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane wins Bundesliga Player of the Month award for October
arts.sum: The Bundesliga have announced that Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane is the winner of the Player of the Month award for October. The England captain beat the likes of Tim Kleindiesnt,…

arts.ttl: Arsenal issue update on Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice injuries - after England pair both withdrew from Lee Carsley's squad this week
arts.sum: During Sunday's 1-1 draw with Chelsea, Rice, playing with a broken toe, was withdrawn in the 71st minute before Saka was taken off after receiving treatment on a leg injury 10 minutes later.
